data.name: label1.Text
data.value: The edithWiki page on SimPregnancy has a screenshot of the Edith editor, as does AkeaPostMortem

data.name: tlpHeader.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="panel3" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="pnParam7" Row="12" RowSpan="1"
